sections.tvShowCount: {count, plural, one {# TV show} other {# TV shows}}
sections.movieIncluded: {count, plural, one {# movie included} other {# movies included}}
sections.episodeCardCount: {count, plural, one {# episode card} other {# episode cards}}

creatorPicker.hint: Tip: leave blank to show top creators.

home.title: OpenPoster
home.tagline: Community-run poster artwork — published from creator-owned nodes.
home.searchHint: Search by TMDB id or title keyword (MVP substring match on indexed titles).
home.creator: Creator

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.welcomeDescription: OpenPoster is a community-run poster network where creators can publish artwork from their own nodes, and everyone can browse, search, and share — without relying on one central site forever.
onboarding.browsingOrCreator: Firstly are you just browsing posters or are you a creator?
onboarding.creatorsThankYou: Creators are the reason OpenPoster exists. Thanks for being here — your work is what makes libraries feel personal.
onboarding.haveAccountQuestion: Do you have an OpenPoster account already, or would you like to create one now?
onboarding.haveAccountLogin: I've got an account, log me in!
onboarding.newSignup: I'm new here, sign me up!
onboarding.alreadyRegistered: That email is already registered. Click “I've got an account, log me in!” and sign in instead.
onboarding.creatorHandleDesc: This is your unique creator handle across the network. It's how people will find your artwork.
onboarding.creatorHandleRules: Rules: 3–32 chars. Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores.
onboarding.sameWifiHint: This step should be done from the same Wi‑Fi/LAN as your server.
onboarding.pairingCodeInfo: We'll connect you using a short pairing code shown by your node.
onboarding.localUrl: Local URL (your server on the LAN)
onboarding.pairingTip: Tip: if the pairing page doesn't load, double-check the Local URL and make sure you're on the same network.
onboarding.publicUrlDesc: This is the URL other people will use to reach your node.
onboarding.publicUrlVerifyDesc: To stop URL hijacking, OpenPoster asks you to prove you control the domain (DNS or a simple text file).
onboarding.name: Name: {value}
onboarding.notVerified: Not verified yet. Try again in a minute.

upload.title: Upload poster
upload.description: Uploads to your connected node's /v1/admin/posters endpoint.
upload.afterUploadRedirect: After upload you'll be redirected to My library.
upload.notConnected: Not connected. Go to Settings first.
upload.collectionTmdbIdPlaceholder: e.g. 131296 — only for movies/backdrops in a collection

settings.title: Settings
settings.notLoggedIn: Not logged in. Go to Onboarding.
settings.nodeAdminDesc: Used for uploading and managing posters on your node. The recommended way to set this up is via Onboarding.
settings.creatorBackdropHint: Wide banner shown at the top of your public creator page.
settings.posterSizeHint: Controls the size of poster cards everywhere in the app.
settings.autoUpdateArtworkHint: On each visit to My Media, OpenPoster checks for updated versions of applied posters and re-applies them to your media server automatically.
settings.addPlexLabels: Add OpenPoster labels to Plex items
settings.addPlexLabelsHint: Adds a tag (e.g. op:poster123) to each item in Plex. This lets OpenPoster recover tracking data if you reset your node, and enables efficient artwork updates. Turning this off will remove all labels OpenPoster has created.

library.title: My library
library.description: Lists posters from your connected node via /v1/posters.
library.notConnected: Not connected. Go to Settings first.
library.noSubscriptions: You haven't subscribed to any themes yet. Browse a creator's page to subscribe.

poster.title: Poster
poster.creatorToolsDesc: Add/remove related links. (MVP rules: links must be /p/[poster_id] and point to posters by the same creator.)
poster.connectNodeHint: To edit links, connect your node in Settings.
poster.wrongNode: You're connected to {connectedNode}, but this poster's home node is {homeNode}. Connect to the correct node to edit links.

studio.title: My Studio
studio.noPostersInTheme: No posters in this theme yet.
studio.deleteConfirm: Delete this poster? This cannot be undone.
studio.deleteThemeBody: This will permanently delete the theme "{title}" and all {count} posters inside it. This cannot be undone.
studio.deleteThemeTypeLabel: Type the theme name to confirm
studio.themeCoverHint: Click to change. Replaces the auto-generated mosaic.
studio.creatorBackdropHint: Wide banner shown at the top of your public creator page.
studio.showCount: {count, plural, one {# TV show} other {# TV shows}}
studio.batchDeleteConfirm: Delete {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}?
studio.movieNotFound: Movie not found. Check the ID and try again.
studio.movieInCollection: Part of {collection} — the full collection will be added.
studio.collectionNotFound: Collection not found. Check the ID and try again.
studio.deleteGroupBody: This will permanently delete all {count} posters in "{title}". This cannot be undone.
studio.removeFromStudioBody: "{title}" will be removed from your Studio sidebar. Your uploaded artwork will not be deleted.
studio.showNotFound: Show not found. Check the ID and try again.
studio.searchByNameOrId: Search by name or TMDB ID
studio.noCollectionsHint: Add a movie collection to start organising and uploading poster artwork for each film in the set.
studio.noMoviesHint: Add a standalone movie to start uploading poster, backdrop, square, and logo artwork.
studio.noTvShowsHint: Add a TV show to start tracking season posters and episode artwork.
studio.defaultArtworkLanguageHint: Language pre-selected when you open the studio
studio.zipImportSelectPrompt: Select a ZIP file containing posters for this {contextType}. Files will be matched automatically by filename.
studio.zipImportNoItems: No recognised items found in this ZIP for the current context.
studio.zipImportSkippedNote: {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}} will be skipped (unrecognised or not relevant to this context).
studio.zipImportImportButton: Import {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}
studio.zipImportDone: Imported {done} of {total} {total, plural, one {item} other {items}}{errors, plural, =0 {} other { · # failed}}.
studio.zipImportCrossThemeWarning: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} already exist in theme "{theme}". These will also be added to the current theme.
studio.zipImportConfirmBody: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} already exist in theme "{theme}". You are importing to "{targetTheme}". After importing, the same artwork will exist in both themes.
studio.zipImportForceLabel: Re-upload {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} already in this theme
studio.toTheNetwork: to the OpenPoster network. Thank you!
studio.heroTagline: Studio is your creative workspace for publishing and organising poster artwork on the OpenPoster network. Connect your node to start uploading.
studio.sessionExpiredAlert: Your node session has expired — your admin token was no longer valid (the node may have been reset). Go to Settings and reconnect your node.
studio.creatorHandleHint: Your creator handle is the username you chose during setup (e.g. mscodemonkey). This is a one-time step needed to finish connecting your account.

myMedia.title: My Media
myMedia.noServersDescription: Connect Plex or Jellyfin to browse your library, track missing artwork, and apply custom posters directly from My Media.
myMedia.noConnection: Connect your node in Settings to use My Media.
myMedia.notConfigured: No media server configured. Go to Settings to connect a media server.
myMedia.resetSuccess: Artwork reset — your media server will restore the original poster.
myMedia.noAlternatives: There is no alternative artwork available in the OpenPoster network at the moment.
myMedia.artworkUpdated: {count, plural, one {# poster updated} other {# posters updated}}
myMedia.showLibrarySubheading: {seasons, plural, one {# season} other {# seasons}} and {episodes, plural, one {# episode} other {# episodes}} available on {server}
myMedia.selectMovieHint: Select a movie to view and apply alternative artwork.
myMedia.movieNotAMember: Not a member of any collections
myMedia.noTmdbIdMovie: No TMDB ID — artwork lookup unavailable for this movie.
myMedia.noTmdbIdItem: No TMDB ID — artwork lookup unavailable for this item.
myMedia.episodeSuggestionBody: {creatorName} has created cards for {count, plural, one {# more episode} other {# more episodes}} in this season. Would you like to apply them all?
myMedia.tooltipSelectPoster: Select a new poster from an OpenPoster creator
myMedia.tooltipSelectEpisodeCard: Select an episode card from an OpenPoster creator
myMedia.tooltipSelectBackdrop: Select a backdrop from an OpenPoster creator
myMedia.tooltipSelectSquare: Select square artwork from an OpenPoster creator
myMedia.tooltipSelectLogo: Select a logo from an OpenPoster creator
myMedia.tooltipViewAltArtwork: View alternate artwork and other options
myMedia.tooltipViewAltBackdrops: View alternate backdrops and other options
myMedia.tooltipViewAltSquare: View alternate square artwork and other options
myMedia.tooltipViewAltLogos: View alternate logos and other options
myMedia.othersLabelSquare: Other square artwork for this movie
myMedia.othersLabelSquareShow: Other square artwork for this show
myMedia.othersLabelEpisodeCards: Other episode cards for this episode
myMedia.suggestionTvBody: {creatorName} has matching artwork for this show: {parts}. Would you like to apply them all?
myMedia.suggestionCollectionBody: There {isAre} {count, plural, one {# other poster} other {# other posters}} by {creatorName} for this collection. Would you like to use them?
myMedia.tmdbNotMatched: Not matched with a collection in TMDB
myMedia.tmdbFoundMatch: We found a possible TMDB match: {name}
myMedia.tooltipNoTmdbMatch: No TMDB match — cannot search for artwork
myMedia.tooltipSelectPosterCollection: Select a new poster from an OpenPoster creator
myMedia.tooltipSelectBackdropCollection: Select a backdrop from an OpenPoster creator
myMedia.tooltipNoTmdbIdArtwork: No TMDB ID — cannot search for artwork

myMedia.cardCollectionMixed: {movieCount, plural, one {# Movie} other {# Movies}}, {showCount, plural, one {# TV Show} other {# TV Shows}}
